headline: Config c-12 reaches 0.91 quality at 38% lower cost than the baseline.

recommended_action.why: It sits at the frontier knee and clears the cost constraint with a comfortable margin.

evidence.summary: Config c-12 is the knee of a clear cost/quality frontier.
Ranking computed over 120 trials, above the reliability floor.

warnings: Latency was not part of the objective; verify it before deploying.
